ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the query */,
  "source_db" TEXT /* Name of the database to be queried */,
  "start_id" INTEGER /* Row ID value of the first source record processed */,
  "end_id" INTEGER /* Row ID value of the last record processed in the batch */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of records to return as a batch */,
  "schema_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the result should include metadata */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was made */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Additional query parameters like filters, sorting options */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format in which the data should be returned */,
  "encryption_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data should be encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_queries_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_queries_source_db FOREIGN KEY ("source_db") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Level of subscription */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* Unique API key for authentication */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string to access the database */,
  "db_type" TEXT /* Type of database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the query failed */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "request_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the query was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES api_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that produced the result */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data returned from the query */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata about the data, if included */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data returned in bytes */,
  "compression_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data was compressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES api_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
